description.ko: 미래형 연구 모듈과 투명한 생명체들이 어우러진, 깊은 바다의 평화롭고 신비로운 빛을 담았습니다.
description.en: The peaceful and mysterious light of the deep ocean, featuring futuristic research modules and transparent lifeforms.

prompt: A cinematic ultra-detailed shot of AQUA-5, titled 'The Bioluminescent Cathedral.' A series of glowing modular spheres submerged in the dark #000080 midnight zone. Surrounding the station are massive #40E0D0 bioluminescent jellyfish and glowing #48D1CC coral. The #006994 water is pressurized with floating marine snow. High-tech lighting from the station illuminates the rugged ocean floor. 8k resolution, photorealistic, capturing the peaceful dance of transparent life in the deep sea.
